description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a whimsical, fantasy creature with a light blue body, large orange eyes, and a pale blue face. Its head is covered with voluminous, mint-green hair, and it features two prominent lavender horn-like protrusions on either side. The toy's hands are oversized with three fingers each, and its feet are similarly stylized, giving it a playful, cartoonish appearance. White spots decorate its arms and back, adding to its fantastical design. The overall look is soft, rounded, and inviting, making it appealing for children or as a decorative item.
description: A soft, fantasy creature stuffed toy with mint-green hair, lavender horns, and large orange eyes, featuring a light blue body and whimsical proportions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the creature's large orange eyes, mint-green hair, lavender horns, and outstretched hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the protruding horn, and the layered hair covering the side of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full volume of the mint-green hair and both lavender horns, with the back and tail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other horn, the side of the face, and the spotted arm and back.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: fantasy creature with mint-green hair and lavender horns
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression appears neutral with slightly downturned eyelids and a small, straight mouth, giving a calm or mildly concerned look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended forward and legs apart, head facing forward.
